description: Response shape for GET /v1/audit/runs/{run_id} (ADR-054 amendment). The audit_runs table stores findings in a dedicated JSONB column rather than a result column (contrast with fix_runs, coverage_runs, etc. which use a result JSONB). Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class AuditRunResponse.

verdict.description: Constitutional audit verdict. 'pass' if all blocking checks passed; 'fail' if any blocking finding exists; 'pending' while the run is executing; null before verdict is computed.

finding_count.description: Total number of audit findings (all severities).

blocking_count.description: Number of blocking findings (severity=block). Determines verdict=fail when > 0.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the audit run began. Null if not yet started.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the audit run completed. Null if still running.

findings.description: AuditFinding objects for this run. Each element conforms to AuditFinding.json. Empty list while status=pending|executing.
